terminal.welcome: Welcome to my portfolio! Type help to see available commands.
terminal.helpText: help - Show this help message whoami - Display information about me ls - List available sections clear - Clear the terminal projects - Show my projects contact - Display contact information Type any command to get started!
terminal.commandNotFound: Command not found: {command}. Type 'help' for available commands.
terminal.sudoHireMe: Access granted. Opening secure communication channel...

mail.name: Your name
mail.subject: Subject
mail.welcomeBody: Thanks for visiting my portfolio. Feel free to explore the projects, browse the timeline, or send me a message using the Compose button.
mail.gettingStartedBody: Use the desktop icons to open apps, or type commands in the Terminal. Try typing 'help' to see what's available.

about.title: René
about.bio: With 30+ years of experience in computing — from writing code on MS-DOS to building AI-powered platforms — I design and build custom software solutions for businesses. Whether it's a SaaS platform, a data pipeline, an AI integration, or a WordPress site, I focus on practical solutions that actually work for the people who use them.

os.metaDescription: ReneTec — Custom software development for insurance, data platforms, AI integration, and WordPress. Based in Quebec.
